mapper.select:
select CUSTOMER_CODE as hqcyrid,CUSTOMER_NAME as hqcyr from T_BUS_CUSTOMER where 1=1
AND CUSTOMER_CODE=#{hqcyrid}
AND CUSTOMER_NAME like'%'||#{hqcyr}||'%'
and rownum <= 100

select CUSTOMERID as zywtrid,FULL_NAME as zywtr from VW_BT_CUSTOMER_MASTER where NVL(TEMPFLAG,'0')!='作废'
AND CUSTOMERID=#{zywtrid}
AND FULL_NAME like'%'||#{zywtr}||'%'
and rownum <= 100
select GSDM zygsdm,gsmch zygsmch from VW_CT_ZYGS

select rownum,a.*, zhwchm||'/'||hwmchXl||'/'||zywtr||'/'||zhl||'/'||tgs||'/'||hc||'/'||khfs as value from ( select distinct car.CARGOKEY as cargokey,CARGOKEY_TYPE as cargokeyType,DGRQ_S as dgrq, DGRQ_E as dgrqE,ZYGSDM as zygsdm,HTID as htid,--HTH as hth, ZYWTRID as zywtrid,ZYWTR as zywtr,TZHDID as tzhdid,car.HC as hc,ZHWCHM as zhwchm , CB as cb,HWDM as hwdmXl,HWMCH as hwmchXl,HW_FLAG as hwFlag,HQCYRID as hqcyrid,HQCYR as hqcyr,KHFS as khfs, SHL as zhl, TGS as tgs,XDS as xds,SYS as sys,car.NOTE as note,FLAG as flag, hg.hgcargokey,yph.TRADE_TYPE mb from BT_SHW_CARGOINFO car,(select distinct CARGOKEY AS hgcargokey,NOTE as hgnote from BT_SHW_HGFX where note='全部通关')hg, T_BUS_CARGO_INFO yph where car.CARGOKEY=hg.hgcargokey(+) and hg.hgcargokey is null and (CARGOKEY_TYPE='卸船' or CARGOKEY_TYPE='分货') and car.id=yph.id and nvl(tgs,0) < nvl(shl,0) and car.FLAG ='否'
and ZYGSDM =#{zygsdm}
and ZHWCHM like '%'||#{zhwchm}||'%'
order by dgrqE desc ) a where rownum <= 60

select rownum,a.*, zhwchm||'/'||to_char(dgrq,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as value from ( select SCN hc, SHIP_NAME zhwchm,IMP_EXP jchkb,TRADE_TYPE mb,ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN DGRQ from T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE where LOAD_UNLOAD='装' and DEL_FLAG=0
and SHIP_NAME like '%'||#{zhwchm}||'%'
order by ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN desc ) a where rownum <= 60

select ENTRY_ID bgdh,DECODE (trim(RELEASE_FLAG),'A','放行','未放行') flag ,trim(TRAF_NAME) ywchm,trim(BILL_NO) tdh, to_number(GROSS_WT)/1000 fxshl,to_date(R_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') fxrq from VW_BT_I_E_PORT where ENTRY_ID =#{bgdh} order by fxrq desc

select distinct ENTRY_ID bgdh,DECODE (trim(WAREHOUSE_CODE),'A','放行','未放行') flag ,trim(FLAGHT_NO) ywchm,trim(BILL_NO) tdh, to_number(regexp_replace(GROS_WT,'[^0-9.]',''))/1000 fxshl,to_date(R_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') fxrq,VOYAGE_NO hghc,AGENT_NAME sbdwmch,TRADE_NAME jydwmch,GOOD_NAME tghwmch,to_number(trim(PASS_PACK_NO)) tgjsh,c.imo,c.dlhc,c.xcdid from VW_SHW_CKFX_MESSAGES a,(select trim(XCD_ID) xcdId,substr(trim(TRANSPORT_ID),3)imo, trim(VOYAGE_NO) dlhc,trim(BILL_NO) tdh,TRANSPORT_NAME ywchm from RZGWL.BT_EDI_XCD_MESSAGE)c WHERE a.BILL_NO=c.tdh(+) and a.VOYAGE_NO=c.dlhc(+) and ENTRY_ID =#{bgdh} order by fxrq desc
select distinct CARGO_CODE hwdmXl,CARGO_NAME hwmchXl from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO

select distinct a.ENTRY_ID bgdh,DECODE (trim(a.RELEASE_FLAG),'A','放行','未放行') flag ,trim(a.TRAF_NAME) ywchm,trim(BILL_NO) tdh, to_number(a.GROSS_WT)/1000 fxshl,to_date(a.R_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') fxrq from VW_BT_I_E_PORT a,
(select max(ENTRY_ID) ENTRY_ID,max(agent_name) agent_name,max(voyage_no) voyage_no,max(traf_name)traf_name from VW_BT_I_E_PORT where ENTRY_ID = #{bgdh} group by ENTRY_ID) b
where a.traf_name=b.traf_name and a.agent_name=b.agent_name and a.voyage_no=b.voyage_no and A.ENTRY_ID not in(select bgdh from PORTMIS.BT_SHW_HGFX where bgdh is not null)

select distinct a.ENTRY_ID bgdh,DECODE (trim(a.WAREHOUSE_CODE),'A','放行','未放行') flag ,trim(a.FLAGHT_NO) ywchm,trim(a.BILL_NO) tdh, to_number(a.GROS_WT)/1000 fxshl,to_date(a.R_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') fxrq,a.VOYAGE_NO hghc,a.AGENT_NAME sbdwmch,a.TRADE_NAME jydwmch,a.GOOD_NAME tghwmch,to_number(trim(a.PASS_PACK_NO)) tgjsh, c.imo,c.dlhc,c.xcdid from VW_SHW_CKFX_MESSAGES a,
(select max(ENTRY_ID) ENTRY_ID,max(agent_name) agent_name,max(voyage_no) voyage_no,max(FLAGHT_NO)FLAGHT_NO from VW_SHW_CKFX_MESSAGES where ENTRY_ID =#{bgdh} group by ENTRY_ID) b,
(select trim(XCD_ID) xcdid,substr(trim(TRANSPORT_ID),3)imo, trim(VOYAGE_NO) dlhc,trim(BILL_NO) tdh,TRANSPORT_NAME ywchm from RZGWL.BT_EDI_XCD_MESSAGE)c
where a.FLAGHT_NO=b.FLAGHT_NO and a.agent_name=b.agent_name and a.voyage_no=b.voyage_no and a.BILL_NO=c.tdh(+) and a.VOYAGE_NO=c.dlhc(+) and A.ENTRY_ID not in(select bgdh from PORTMIS.BT_SHW_HGFX where bgdh is not null)
